title: スタンプカードのクラス

cases.name: 満了していない代表例

output.evaluator: (output, input) => { const expected = input.initialStamps + input.addStamps; if (!output || typeof output !== "object") return false; if (output.shopName !== input.shopName || output.stamps !== expected || output.isFull !== (expected >= 10)) return false; if (typeof output.add !== "function") return false; const after = output.add(1); return after === expected + 1 && output.stamps === expected + 1 && output.isFull === (expected + 1 >= 10); }
